column1: K.P. Energy(KPEL) is a part of the KP Group of Surat. It is involved in the development of utility scale wind power generation infrastructure. The major activities encompass siting of wind farms, acquisition of lands and permits, EPCC of wind projects, along with balance of plant (BoP) infrastructure. KPEL also owns and operates WTGs (Wind Turbine Generators) and solar power plant as an IPP( Independent Power Producers).  The company undertakes projects principally in Gujarat. [1]
